_comment_t1792: CWV 'good' thresholds (T-1792): LCP <= 2.5s, FCP <= 1.8s, CLS <= 0.1, TBT <= 200ms. Performance / a11y / best-practices / seo are all error-gated so regressions fail CI. If a new page regresses below these numbers the right fix is to optimize, not to loosen the gate — see web.dev/articles/vitals for the underlying definitions.
